calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: his cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.
Petitioner Behzad Naghzhinehpourestahani present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name Behzad Naghzhinehpourestahani to Behzad Naghzhinehpour.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
